expectations.text: Claude doesn't crash or give up on a nearly empty project — still proceeds with interview
KNOWN list is appropriately short (1-2 items), reflecting the sparse codebase
expectations.evidence: Two brief sections: files present, what's missing. Appropriately terse.

expectations.text: Claude does not assume a framework, test runner, or architecture that isn't present
expectations.evidence: Correctly identifies nothing beyond package.json and AGENTS.md

expectations.text: First question is about what the user is building
expectations.evidence: Asks 'What is this project? Tell me what you're building'

expectations.text: Questions include concrete options and a recommendation
expectations.evidence: Completely open-ended: 'Tell me what you're building — the problem it solves, who uses it, and the tech stack'. No options, no recommendation.
